items.title: Nolan Wells' family demands answers about US teen's death after boating trip
items.dek: Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends.
items.body: Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hegseth frustrated with lack of adherence to grooming rules after "beardos" speech last year
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US declassifies even more UFO videos
items.dek: The US government published a fourth instalment of unresolved cases, promising to release more files on a rolling basis.
items.body: The US government published a fourth instalment of unresolved cases, promising to release more files on a rolling basis.
